sub_goals.description: Self-contained web app: index.html + 6 JS files + styles.css.
sub_goals.verification_notes: S6.A1 boots in browser without console errors. S6.A2 first-load seed = To Do/Doing/Done with no cards (DEFAULT_SEED). S6.A3 reload restores via Persistence.load. S6.A4 no Save button anywhere. S6.A5 autosave subscribes to every mutation.
